trivia_bullets.text: Prismite debuted in War of the Spark (2019) with Ravnica-flavored flavor text: 'It didn't budge when the portal opened, nor when the ancient gods emerged. It came to life only when all ten guilds came together to face a common threat.' — referencing the moment all ten Ravnica guilds united against Nicol Bolas's invasion. The M20 reprint (this copy) replaced that text with the simpler 'Even its shadow is a dazzling rainbow.'

Prismite is illustrated by Alayna Danner across all three of its prints (War of the Spark, M20, M21). Danner is a Seattle-based fantasy artist and Commander player with over 97 MTG cards illustrated, including panoramic basic lands for Commander 2019. Hipsters of the Coast has covered her work in Secret Lair and Commander preview contexts; she also collaborated with Rebecca Guay on a Guay Kickstarter (2020).
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Rebecca Guay Adds Collaborations with Seb McKinnon and Alayna Danner

trivia_bullets.text: As an Artifact Creature — Golem (2/1 for {2}) that pays {2} to add one mana of any color, Prismite is Pauper-legal and offers mana-fixing on a creature body — differently answering removal than pure artifact rocks. EDHREC records it in approximately 13,832 Commander decks.
"Even its shadow is a dazzling rainbow." — No attributed speaker. The M20 flavor text; see also the WAR flavor text above for the set-specific variant.
